description: Anand Gomes, co-founder of Paradigm, discusses the potential for the traditional finance options market to transition on-chain, alongside panelists from various DeFi projects. They explore the current size of the options market in crypto, comparing DeFi and CeFi derivatives, and highlight the growth opportunities in the sector.
topic_summary: The panel discusses the transition of the $450 billion daily options market from traditional finance to on-chain solutions, examining the current state of crypto derivatives, which are valued at approximately $3 billion in DeFi and $90 billion in CeFi, compared to $16 trillion in traditional finance. [t=217.23]
